issues.description: First effect missing condition checking if only East Blue characters on your field. DSL has HasAttachedDon condition but card text requires field composition check (LeaderHasType or equivalent for all Characters).
First effect should trigger on opponent's turn (passive/continuous), not Activated. Card text '[Opponent's Turn]' indicates automatic trigger during opponent turn, not Main activation.
Duration 'EndOfTurn' is incorrect for '[Opponent's Turn]' text. Should be 'DuringOpponentTurn' to represent the continuous conditional during opponent's turn phase.
Second effect trigger should be 'Activated' with proper Main phase specification in condition, but lacks 'OncePerTurn' condition enforcement in DSL structure.
Rest action missing condition that target must have '2 or more DON!! cards given'. Current DSL has no restriction on valid targets.
